frontendStatus: Production frontend built entirely from readable TypeScript source; no recovered application bundle is loaded
architecture: Bundled local Node server with tokenized localhost API, bounded requests, verified temporary writes, rollback-capable atomic replacement, platform-core abstractions, structured SFTP v3 workstation transport, server-owned atomic launch handshake, physical-hardware-aware macOS runtime selection, centralized browser capability detection, robust document-level optimization-window pointer capture, sanitized optional-plane constraints, graceful WebGL diagnostics, normalized cross-browser wheel input, modular frontend architecture, and automated browser, scientific, storage, security, SFTP, launcher, window-interaction, and release-integrity tests, launchd-owned detached server lifecycle with fresh mode/profile selection on every relaunch, authenticated reuse only for an exact selected-session match, and cancellation-safe interactive SSH authentication helpers that terminate promptly after interrupted passphrase or Duo prompts; explicit remote authentication stage with no silent pre-authentication session reuse; robust Terminal .command authentication launch with startup acknowledgement, nounset-safe helper generation, and complete release-content enforcement
